title: Hydra Decision Record entry
description: One decision entry — a single line in logs/decisions/<YYYY-MM-DD>.jsonl. Records WHY Commander made a consequential decision (tier-classify, ticket-pick, subagent-route, scope, merge-surface, escalate, rescue, gc, pause). Append-only, written by scripts/record-decision.sh, read by scripts/decisions.sh. Spec: docs/specs/2026-06-08-decision-record.md (ticket #267). The five always-known fields are required; the rest are optional so a forced/low-context decision is still recordable. approval_ref is the seam for the sibling Approval Record (#268).

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp, second precision (e.g. 2026-06-08T18:30:00Z). The moment the decision was made.

decision_type.description: Which consequential decision point this records. Mirrors CLAUDE.md's operating-loop + safety/merge decision points.

subject.description: The thing decided about — a ticket/PR/worker ref (e.g. tonychang04/hydra#501, worker-abc123).

decided.description: What was chosen (e.g. surface-for-human, T2, worker-implementation).

why.description: Rule/policy clause + concrete evidence (e.g. 'policy.md T2: touches >1 module; scripts/x.sh:12').

alternatives.description: Rejected options. Absent or empty allowed (some decisions are forced).

why_rejected.description: Why this alternative was not chosen.

confidence.description: How sure Commander was about this decision.

what_would_reverse.description: The new fact that flips this decision (e.g. 'if the PR drops the auth-path edit').

approval_ref.description: Seam for the Approval Record (#268). A link/ref to an approval record when the decision was human-gated; null (or absent) otherwise. Defined here, populated by #268.
